name: Bethel Bread
recipeIngredient: 5 cups AM Unbleached Flour (White or Whole Wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the liquids and add to the dry mix. Mix until creamy.
3. Cover and set in a warm place for 15 minutes.
4. Gradually stir in wheat flour until too thick to stir.
5. Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead in more flour until the dough is only slightly sticky.
6. Knead for 5 minutes.
7. Place in an oiled bowl and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size.
8. Shape into two loaves.
9. Place in oiled bread pans and let rise until the volume increases by half.
10. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until nicely browned.
11. Let cool slightly.
12. Remove from pans and let cool on a rack.
